bullets: Generated Rs. 1M+ ARR in nine months through pricing, packaging, and personalized upsell strategy for zero-to-one platform products.

Partnered with engineering and data science to evaluate ML personalization models, converting behavioral insights into product requirements.
Increased session duration 40%, page views 15%, and video consumption 12%, strengthening workflow adoption signals.
Built referral incentive mechanics that doubled organic revenue contribution from 1.5% to 3%, creating direct loyalty and rewards evidence.
Scaled Job Guarantee revenue 10x, from Rs. 1M to Rs. 10M, through monetization, packaging, and go-to-market alignment.
Improved traffic-to-lead conversion by 62% and lead-to-customer conversion by 40% through structured experimentation and journey optimization.
Prioritized reliability and trust across mobile money workflows supporting 10M+ monthly transactions.
Improved payment product engagement to 83% and CSAT to 94% through targeting, segmentation, and multichannel integration.
